symptoms: Trips out after a few seconds.

tests.error-log: BEATER OVERCURRENT trip on first start. Last night's shutdown skipped the standby cycle.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel at −15 °C. That's not soft serve, that's a glacier.
tests.inspect-beater: Barrel is frozen into a solid cylinder of ice around the beater.
tests.continuity-test: Motor windings and run capacitor all read healthy.

flavour: The machine wasn't broken. It was hibernating.
authenticityNote: Skip the overnight standby mode and the barrel freezes into a block; the stalled beater presents exactly like a dead run capacitor until you look inside or meter the motor. Defrost and a stern word with the closing shift.
